# Recruiting Intelligence Brief
**Search topic:** Automotive Semiconductor 薪资 招聘趋势 中国
**Time range:** Last month
**Sources reviewed:** 3
## Key Takeaways
- Automotive semiconductor salaries in China are competitive, with growth driven by tech advancements and market expansion.
- Manager-level roles see higher pay, while director-level positions command the highest salaries.
- Industry trends favor skilled professionals in AI and autonomous driving technologies.
## Recruiting Notes
- Treat this as a hiring-demand signal; verify whether the roles are active before using it in outreach or market sizing.
- Treat this as an investment or footprint signal; connect it with job postings to infer likely team build-out.
- Use compensation references as directional only; validate salary bands with fresh job postings before reporting.
- Prioritize evidence that mentions hiring volume, role families, locations, R&D expansion, or manufacturing footprint.
## Evidence Highlights
### 1. 汽车半导体市场规模、份额和增长预测[2024-2033]
- What it says: 通过组件（处理器，模拟IC，离散电源设备，传感器，存储器等），按车辆类型（乘用车和商用车），通过推进（ICE＆Electry），按应用（Powertrain，Powertrain，Powertrain，Safettrain，Safety，Safety，Safety，Body Electronics，Chassis＆Fabassics＆Infotics＆Infotics＆Infotics）2022 224 224 . "United States Medical Devices Market!". 全球汽车半导体市场规模在2023年的价值为655.5亿美元，预计将从2024年的719.7亿美元增长，到2032年达到1.2304亿美元，在预测期内的复合年增长率为6.9％。亚太地区在2023年以41.5％的份额统治了...
- Recruiting relevance: Footprint or investment signal; useful for inferring where future technical or operations hiring may grow.
- Source: [汽车半导体市场规模、份额和增长预测[2024-2033]](https://www.fortunebusinessinsights.com/zh/automotive-semiconductor-market-106780)
### 2. 2024-半导体行业薪酬报告
- What it says: • 消费电子： 消费电子市场竞争激烈，手机、 PC 等传统终端出货呈现弱复苏趋势。尽管在 AI 功能加持下有望稳健增长，但整体市场已经相对成熟，. • 5nm 及以下工艺： 随着技术的不断进步， 5nm 及. • 28nm 工艺： 28nm 工艺因其高性价比，将继续在. • 市场规模： 2019 2023 年，中国先进.
